title: Satan's Bakhage
description: This is a Modpack centered around the Create mod, Visuals and Performance.
body:
### Hey there, modpack enthusiasts! 

This modpack is all about **Create**, taking your crafting and automation to the next level. We've packed in a ton of **Create add-ons**, like **Create New Age**, **Create Big Cannons**, and **Slice and Dice**, to give you even more options for building amazing contraptions. 

We've also included some **performance mods** to keep your game running smooth, even with all these additions. And for those who want a truly immersive experience, we've got **Iris Shader Loader** and **Distant Horizons** to enhance your visuals and expand your view. 

Speaking of immersive, we've added **Farmers Delight** to expand your culinary options and **Simple Voicechat** for seamless communication with your friends.  

Finally, we've added some **compatible texture packs** for a little extra flair.  
This modpack is designed for **easy server integration**, so you can share the fun with your friends! Get ready to build, automate, explore, and chat in style!

### Notice:
- It's recomended to **export your shaderpack settings before updating the modpack** to a newer version. The reason for this is because modrinth **wipes the shaderpacks folder**, where some shaders keep their settings (_Complementary Shaders - Reimagined_ does this), under the update prosess. If this is not done you may risk having your **shader settings wiped**.

### Legal:
- This modpack features an imported datapack, Create Renewable Ores, published under the MIT lincence [on github](https://github.com/mFireworks/Create-Renewable-Ores). This datapack was first added to the modpack in v2.1.0.
- This modpack uses the shaderpack [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined). 
- This modpack containes modified versions of the resource pack [SPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr). The modification in question just removes all files with "rail" in the name. This is done for compatibility with [RAY's 3D rails](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rays-3d-rails). SPBR is covered under the GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 3 (GPL-3.0-or-later). [See the copyright license here](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.en.html). The modified resource pack was first added to the modpack in v1.3.0.
